title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: Tutorial demonstrating how to build a real-world multi-agent AI travel planning system using LangGraph. The system uses four specialized agents for flights, hotels, itineraries, and final response generation, integrated with APIs and PostgreSQL for memory persistence.
